mechanism_narrative: A persistent decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, directly compressing equity valuation multiples and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate crosses above 4.0 percent, it signals deteriorating labor market conditions that trigger corporate earnings downgrades, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in more than 60% of triggered instances despite the unemployment threshold breach, or the predictive Rank IC drops below 0.02 over a 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: The joint contraction of industrial production and real personal savings indicates simultaneous supply chain bottlenecks and demand destruction, which compresses equity risk premiums and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over a 20-day horizon.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO falls more than 1.0% month-over-month while RSAFS declines for two consecutive months
failure_condition: The combined signal fails to predict negative returns in more than 55% of out-of-sample instances, or the interaction term coefficient in a multivariate regression becomes statistically insignificant (p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: During periods of accelerating consumer credit growth, housing starts act as a leading indicator for durable goods demand, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over a 60-day horizon as corporate revenue growth accelerates.
failure_condition: Forward 60-day returns in credit expansion periods do not exceed the unconditional mean by at least 1.5%, or the lead-lag correlation between RSAFS and SPX decays to zero over a 5-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in the industrial production index reflects expanding manufacturing capacity and operational efficiency, which directly boosts corporate profit margins and yields positive S&P 500 forward returns over a 5-day trading window.
failure_condition: The monthly Rank IC for INDPRO against 5-day forward SPX returns remains below 0.01 across all available data, or forward returns show no statistically significant difference between INDPRO growth deciles.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate exceeds 5.0 percent, the cost of capital suppresses equity valuations and reduces leverage capacity for corporate buybacks, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over a 60-day horizon.
failure_condition: SPX forward 60-day returns remain positive in more than 65% of observations where FEDFUNDS stays above 5.0%, or the signal's directional accuracy falls below 52% in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: The simultaneous acceleration of nonfarm payrolls and contraction in real personal savings indicates wage-driven inflation that forces the Federal Reserve to maintain restrictive policy, depressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS rises more than 150k month-over-month while RSAFS declines
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict negative returns in more than 50% of out-of-sample instances, or the interaction effect vanishes when controlling for CPIAUCSL in a multivariate model.

mechanism_narrative: In a late-cycle expansion where GDP growth exceeds 3.0 percent annualized, housing starts serve as a high-frequency proxy for consumer confidence, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over a 5-day horizon as earnings revisions turn upward.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 annualized growth rate exceeds 3.0 percent
regime_hint: late-cycle expansion with robust GDP growth
failure_condition: Forward 5-day returns in high-GDP periods do not outperform low-GDP periods by at least 1.0%, or the lead-lag relationship between HOUST and SPX breaks down during recessionary episodes.
